response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frontend frameworks like React. His background in AI agent infrastructure, cloud platforms, and open-source contributions aligns well with the role's requirements. His diverse project history and leadership in developer tooling further strengthen his candidacy.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (6+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest).
Proven track record in AI agent development and developer tooling, including contributions to Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in technical workshops, demonstrating deep technical expertise and community engagement.
concerns: Career gap (October 2025–Present) may require clarification regarding motivation and recent skill relevance.
Experience with Kotlin/Java is present but not as prominently featured as TypeScript/Node.js, which may limit depth in secondary stack requirements.
German language skills are basic, which could pose minor challenges in a Berlin-based team with potential local collaboration needs.

key_factors.factor: Career gap and secondary stack depth
